summary: SPK RC 32 lam ro runtime worker tren NAS: tach bai toan stale worker va sim-mode do thieu FFmpeg.
changes: Worker runtime summary gio phan biet ro worker da stale voi worker dang online nhung bi roi vao sim mode vi chua thay FFmpeg that.
Popup Proxy ladder tren web gio chi hien huong dan dung voi SPK native, khong con tron thong diep Docker gay nhieu.
Bo sung regression test de khoa chat chuan doan sim-mode tren SPK va giu on dinh flow transcode SQLite da sua o RC31.
